creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
The pkg in the repo has been built from version 0.9.3_8 of upstream code that was written for Python 2.x .

A later variant (v1.14) has been produced from a fork that is now Python 3.x based. This is available from a new upstream source in August 2023.

https://github.com/barracuda-fsh/pyobd/releases/
